title: Pronouns On Join
description: A simple mod to fetch people's pronouns from PronounDB.org, and set custom pronouns.
body:
### Add pronouns to players!
`/pronouns help`

I always play on a small online server, and find it awkward to ask someone's pronouns. Instead of looking in the Discord chat history for previous answers, I can now save what they said and know for sure!

!["Player joined the game". Right after the join message: "Player goes by: he/him"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/taXCMKDL/images/8c6a62752a517d2b9777a715183d57103399cd63.png)

This mod also connects with [PronounDB](https://pronoundb.org/) to fetch online players' pronouns. People can link their Minecraft account (and other kinds of accounts) here and set their pronouns.
You can set someone's pronouns manually (if they don't have any in the PronounDB), and overwrite previously defined pronouns.

![Image of player list. One player name per line, followed by a colon, then their (custom) pronouns.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/taXCMKDL/images/4a3dc95bde47436101e12856a9e786eb063e8d1a.png)

Note: this mod is client-side only, so unfortunately nobody will be able to see what pronouns you set for other people. You can share the configuration file with other people though, if you would like to share.

Mod has been tested on 1.21.1 and 1.20, so I hope all versions in-between work too lol.
